items.title_en: Roth IRA owners may need a second retirement account to claim the new Saver's Match
items.title_zh: Roth IRA 所有者可能需要第二个退休账户才能领取新的 Saver's Match
items.desc_en: The Saver's Match program, which starts in 2027, is for lower- and moderate-income retirement savers — but Roth IRA owners may face a hurdle to get the money.
items.desc_zh: Saver's Match 计划于 2027 年启动，面向中低收入退休储蓄者，但 Roth IRA 所有者可能面临获得这笔钱的障碍。

items.desc_en: Dell reported blowout fiscal first quarter results on Thursday thanks to booming AI server demand, leading many analysts to raise their price targets.
items.desc_zh: 由于人工智能服务器需求蓬勃发展，戴尔周四公布了井喷式第一财季业绩，导致许多分析师提高了价格目标。

items.desc_zh: 罗马尼亚将在造成两人受伤的事件发生后召开紧急会议。

items.title_en: Trump lays out Iran deal demands, says he's about to make 'final determination'
items.title_zh: 特朗普提出伊朗协议要求，称他即将做出“最终决定”
items.desc_en: Trump's Truth Social statement left unclear which of his conditions are already part of a deal that negotiators are working on to pause the U.S.-Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普的真相社会声明并未明确他的哪些条件已经成为谈判代表正在努力达成的暂停美伊战争协议的一部分。

items.title_en: Michael Dell courted Trump early. His company has reaped rewards
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·戴尔很早就向特朗普示好。他的公司获得了回报
items.desc_en: The dynamic is emblematic of how business is seeking to sow favor with the president in his second term, and has departed from the norms of big business philanthropy.
items.desc_zh: 这种动态象征着企业如何寻求在总统第二任期内讨好总统，并且背离了大企业慈善事业的规范。

items.title_en: Former US attorney general Pam Bondi testifies in congressional Epstein probe
items.title_zh: 美国前司法部长帕姆·邦迪在国会爱泼斯坦调查中作证
items.desc_en: The testimony comes about a month after America's top prosecutor was ousted by US President Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 该证词是在美国最高检察官被美国总统唐纳德·特朗普罢免一个月后发表的。

items.desc_en: Sixteen pupils died in the fire that ripped through a dormitory while they were asleep.
items.desc_zh: 十六名学生在睡觉时吞噬宿舍的大火中丧生。

items.desc_en: The world's 30 most valuable soccer teams are worth an average of $2.66 billion, according to CNBC's official team valuations.
items.desc_zh: 根据 CNBC 官方球队估值，全球 30 支最有价值的足球队平均身价为 26.6 亿美元。

items.title_en: Netanyahu says he has directed IDF to increase control of Gaza to 70%
items.title_zh: 内塔尼亚胡表示，他已指示以色列国防军将对加沙的控制权增加到70%
items.desc_en: The expansion in control by Israel would contradict the terms of the ceasefire  Israel and Hamas agreed to in October 2025.
items.desc_zh: 以色列扩大控制权将违反以色列和哈马斯于 2025 年 10 月达成的停火条款。

items.title_en: Survival before safety for Delhi's poor as temperatures hit 45C
items.title_zh: 气温高达 45 摄氏度，德里穷人的生存先于安全
items.desc_en: As temperatures peak, Delhi’s informal workers continue working despite growing health risks.
items.desc_zh: 随着气温达到顶峰，德里的非正规工人尽管健康风险不断增加，但仍继续工作。

items.title_en: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
items.title_zh: 宝马称人形机器人是汽车制造的“未来”
items.desc_en: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.
items.desc_zh: 宝马正在向欧洲的一家汽车工厂引入人形机器人，其基础是美国的类似项目。

items.title_zh: 加州总检察长因 2023 年数据泄露起诉 23andMe 继任者
items.desc_en: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.
items.desc_zh: 司法部长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 指控该公司在泄露事件的严重性方面撒了谎。

items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。

items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。
